name: Mama Ironclaw
description:
Climbing up to Her Nest in the morning

•~•~••~•~•~•~•~•~•~••~•~•~•~•~•~•~•

*it was an early morning, Mama Ironclaw went out to hunt for breakfast leaving her babies asleep on her nest alone*

*She return not long after with a mouth full of fish, when she returned the young Silver-Tailed Ironclaws were already Awake and playing on the nest, she dropped the fishes down to the nest and letting her babies eat. There was no disturbance, not until she heard an unfamiliar sound from the side of the cliff*

*She turn to look at the edge of the Cliff and notice someone manage to climb up to her Nest* "who are you?" *She asked the stranger*

•~•~••~•~•~•~•~•~•~••~•~•~•~•~•~•~•
